com.pax.poslink

Class PaymentRequest.Original

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.pax.poslink.PaymentRequest.Original
  • Enclosing class:
    PaymentRequest

    public static class PaymentRequest.Original
extends java.lang.Object

    • Field Summary

      Fields 
      Modifier and Type Field and Description
      java.lang.String Amount
      The Original Amount, $$$$$$$CC.
      java.lang.String AuthorizationResponse
      Original authorization data used in follow up transactions.
      java.lang.String BatchNumber
      The original batch number.
      java.lang.String ExpiryDate
      Expiry date in MMYY of account number for original transaction.
      Conditional for matching card on terminal in subsequent transactions after SALE, i.e.
      java.lang.String Pan
      Last 4 digits of account number for original transaction.
      Conditional for matching card on terminal in subsequent transactions after SALE, i.e.
      java.lang.String PaymentService2000
      Original Payment Service 2000
      java.lang.String SettlementDate
      Original transaction settlement date, the format is YYYYMMDD.
      java.lang.String TransactionIdentifier
      Transaction Identifier of the previous or original transaction.
      java.lang.String TransDate
      Original Transaction Date in YYYYMMDD format.
      Conditional for some hosts for subsequent transactions after SALE, i.e.
      java.lang.String TransId
      Deprecated. 
      (deprecated since V1.12.00) use PaymentRequest.OrigTraceNum instead.
      java.lang.String TransTime
      Original Transaction Time in HHMMSS format.
      Conditional for some hosts for subsequent transactions after SALE, i.e.
      java.lang.String TransType
      Original transaction type.

    • Method Summary

      • Methods inherited from class java.lang.Object

        clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

    • Field Detail

      • TransDate

        public java.lang.String TransDate
        Original Transaction Date in YYYYMMDD format.
        Conditional for some hosts for subsequent transactions after SALE, i.e. RETURN…
        If the Host requires this mandatory field, the current date on terminal will be send.

        Attribute: n8

      • Pan

        public java.lang.String Pan
        Last 4 digits of account number for original transaction.
        Conditional for matching card on terminal in subsequent transactions after SALE, i.e. RETURN…

        Attribute: n4

      • ExpiryDate

        public java.lang.String ExpiryDate
        Expiry date in MMYY of account number for original transaction.
        Conditional for matching card on terminal in subsequent transactions after SALE, i.e. RETURN…

        Attribute: n4

      • TransTime

        public java.lang.String TransTime
        Original Transaction Time in HHMMSS format.
        Conditional for some hosts for subsequent transactions after SALE, i.e. RETURN…
        If the Host requires this mandatory field, the current time on terminal will be send.

        Attribute: n6

      • SettlementDate

        public java.lang.String SettlementDate
        Original transaction settlement date, the format is YYYYMMDD.

        Attribute: n8

      • TransType

        public java.lang.String TransType
        Original transaction type. Please see the PaymentTransType.

        Attribute: n2

      • Amount

        public java.lang.String Amount
        The Original Amount, $$$$$$$CC.

        Attribute: n...9

      • BatchNumber

        public java.lang.String BatchNumber
        The original batch number.

        Attribute: ans...32

      • TransId

        @Deprecated
public java.lang.String TransId
        Deprecated. (deprecated since V1.12.00) use PaymentRequest.OrigTraceNum instead.
        Deprecated since the STAN value is mapped to Original Trace Number in Request Trace Information.

        Attribute: ans...32

      • PaymentService2000

        public java.lang.String PaymentService2000
        Original Payment Service 2000

        Data returned as part of the original authorization response from the issuer, used in follow up transactions (token/card-on-file, reversals, incremental). Format varies by card scheme.

        Attribute: ans...22

        Since:
        V1.08.00

      • AuthorizationResponse

        public java.lang.String AuthorizationResponse
        Original authorization data used in follow up transactions.

        Attribute: ans...66

        Since:
        V1.08.00

      • TransactionIdentifier

        public java.lang.String TransactionIdentifier
        Transaction Identifier of the previous or original transaction.
        It’s used for Credential/Card on File (CoF) transactions.

        Attribute: ans...16

        Since:
        V1.11.00

    • Constructor Detail

      • Original

        public Original()
